title: Subitems should be included in duplicates of archived boards
excerpt:
Description
When duplicating an archived board and selecting the option to “duplicate” all items (updates, etc.) - the subitems don’t get copied. 
What are you trying to achieve
Have subitems be available for duplicates …

posts.author: JustinThibault (Justin Thibault)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

When duplicating an archived board and selecting the option to “duplicate” all items (updates, etc.) - the subitems don’t get copied.

What are you trying to achieve

Have subitems be available for duplicates of archived boards
